title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist AI system automates medical discoveries and drug discovery by collaborating with researchers. Robin is an agent system with consensus mechanisms that identifies treatments for diseases including cancer, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss, published in Nature.
